name: Baidu Ecommerce Search
description: Search Baidu's e-commerce platform for products, rankings, and brand/category data. Serves agents operating in Chinese-market contexts. Supports product search, rankings, parameters, brand and category knowledge. ~1000 downloads validating real demand.
review: Baidu Ecommerce Search is a solid niche offering with genuine usage traction (~1000 downloads). The skill has been actively refined, with the latest version sensibly narrowing scope to core strengths. No Baidu or Chinese e-commerce skill exists in the current catalog — unique regional coverage. Primary concern is absence of a publicly linkable GitHub repository for code audit.
notes: CONDITIONAL LISTING. Required: (1) Author must provide a GitHub source repository URL for code audit (contact @crossallen on GitHub Issue #291). (2) English description should be added alongside the Chinese summary in SKILL.md for international discoverability. Listing published with conditions per score 7.1/10 ≥ 6.5 threshold.

rocket_findings.note: No GitHub repo confirmed; ClawHub SPA metadata only
